settings.subhead: Six Australian-built SaaS apps covering cyber, ops, governance, and compliance — in one ecosystem. Trusted by Perth teams. Ready in minutes.

settings.lede: From AI automation to Australian cyber compliance, every EvoTech app is built to work standalone — or together through a single identity layer.

settings.headline: Everything you wanted to ask before you buy.
settings.lede: Pricing, data residency, integrations, onboarding — all answered below.

settings.question: What is the EvoTech SaaS Ecosystem?
settings.answer: A suite of six integrated Australian-built SaaS products covering cyber security, IT operations, governance, procurement, and compliance.

settings.question: Is my data stored in Australia?
settings.answer: Yes — all data hosted in Australian AWS regions with optional single-tenant isolation.

settings.question: How does Essential8 Compass help with compliance?
settings.answer: It continuously tests your environment against ACSC's eight strategies and exports auditor-ready packs for ML1–ML3.

settings.question: Can I use one app without buying the rest?
settings.answer: Yes. Every product is sold standalone. Add more later with no migration.

settings.question: What does pricing start at?
settings.answer: From A$59/month (ProcureIQ) to A$499/month (SentryOps). Annual plans save 20%.

settings.question: How fast can SentryOps be deployed?
settings.answer: Median time to live threat monitoring is 48 hours.

settings.question: Do you integrate with Microsoft 365?
settings.answer: Yes — native OAuth for Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Google Workspace, Okta, plus 400+ apps.

settings.question: Is support included?
settings.answer: Yes — Perth-based human support on every plan, with 1-hour SLA on paid tiers.

settings.question: Can I bring my existing hardware?
Is there a money-back guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes — 30-day unconditional refund on any annual plan.

settings.headline: Move your IT operation to the next decade.
settings.lede: Start with one app, grow into six. 14-day free trial. No credit card. Perth support from day one.
